Game.Name: Ranma 1-2 - Bakuretsu Rantou Hen (Japan)
Game.plot: Ranma 1/2: Hard Battle is an Action game, developed by Atelier Double and published by NCS,which was released in Japan in 1992.Cheat: CodesAfter choosing a character, hold R + X + A. The debug menu will appear before the round starts.Cheat: CodesWhen you select Versus Mode, if both players hold L+R, they can select the same character. If player 1 does this in Team Battle, they can pick a team of characters for the computer to play against them. This can also be done in standard Versus Mode.Cheat: CodesAt the Game Mode select screen, press Select, X, Up, Left, Down, Right, Up. If done right, the names of the character will appear on top and you can choose to see all their visual scenes.Cheat: Alternate creditsBeat the game on hard to see a different credits sequence featuring the transformed charactersNote that this is only needs to be done on the JP release as it is already the default ending in the other versions.
